substep.title: Read Bundle State
substep.action:
From session state (handed off by code-orient in execution mode, or by code-plan if running through in a single session): - {{bundle_dir}}, {{ticket_path}}, {{ticket_alias}}, {{ticket_slug}}, {{primary_tag}} - {{plan_paths}} (list; accepted) - {{plan_count}} - {{parallel_safety}} (parallel | sequential | N/A) - {{pr_mode}} (true | false)
Verify each plan doc has status: "accepted". If any plan is active or draft, halt: "Plan {{path}} has status {{actual_status}}; expected accepted. Run code-plan to lock before invoking code-implement."

substep.title: Initialize Strike Counter
substep.action: For decomposition tracking per Lock 17.2: {{decomposition_strikes}} = {} (dict mapping slice_id → count).

substep.title: Identify Slice Execution Order
substep.action:
Build the execution queue:
- Single plan: read slice dependency order from the plan doc; enqueue slices in order.
- Multi-plan sequential: enqueue plan-1 slices in order, then plan-2 slices, etc.
- Multi-plan parallel-safe: enqueue all plans' slices; track which can run in parallel (independent worktrees per plan).
Store as {{slice_queue}} = list of {plan_n, slice_id, worktree_branch}.
